programme.title: Geen programmagegevens beschikbaar
programme.desc: Geen programmagegevens beschikbaar.

programme.title: Viaticum
programme.desc: A recovering alcoholic who has left her past behind is interrupted in her early morning recitation of the Twelve Steps by a phone call. Her father, estranged for twenty-three years, is on his death bed in at a Toronto hospital.

programme.title: The leak
programme.desc: Maria has always played the part of the caring mother and grandmother, which is what everyone expected from her. But then a simple question leads her to realise that she needs an authentic friendship.

programme.title: Out of scene
programme.desc: The characters in an Edward Hopper painting come to life.

programme.title: The silent child
programme.desc: Libby is een vierjarig meisje met een zware gehoorstoornis die opgroeit in een middenklassengezin en leeft in een wereld van stilte. Tot een toegewijde sociale werkster haar de gave van het communiceren schenkt.

programme.title: From emily
programme.desc: A married man is haunted by an ex-fling when he hears that her plane has gone down in a crash.

programme.title: Until the last train
programme.desc: Two women and a social mandate; a train station that brings them back together. This time, they must face their desires and make a decision.

programme.title: Marusía
programme.desc: Two ordinary guys with nothing to lose because they might have already lost everything, they decide to run away heading nowhere. But sometimes running away is not the solution.

programme.title: The midnight hour - concealed longings
programme.desc: Welcome to the Midnight Hour, the show bringing you everything from blood and guts to satisfy all your horror film needs. Tonight, tensions rise as our leads have to deal with the elephant in the room and it could have disastrous results...

programme.title: Viaticum
programme.desc: A recovering alcoholic who has left her past behind is interrupted in her early morning recitation of the Twelve Steps by a phone call. Her father, estranged for twenty-three years, is on his death bed in at a Toronto hospital.

programme.title: The leak
programme.desc: Maria has always played the part of the caring mother and grandmother, which is what everyone expected from her. But then a simple question leads her to realise that she needs an authentic friendship.

programme.title: Out of scene
programme.desc: The characters in an Edward Hopper painting come to life.

programme.title: The silent child
programme.desc: Libby is een vierjarig meisje met een zware gehoorstoornis die opgroeit in een middenklassengezin en leeft in een wereld van stilte. Tot een toegewijde sociale werkster haar de gave van het communiceren schenkt.

programme.title: From emily
programme.desc: A married man is haunted by an ex-fling when he hears that her plane has gone down in a crash.

programme.title: Until the last train
programme.desc: Two women and a social mandate; a train station that brings them back together. This time, they must face their desires and make a decision.

programme.title: Marusía
programme.desc: Two ordinary guys with nothing to lose because they might have already lost everything, they decide to run away heading nowhere. But sometimes running away is not the solution.

programme.title: Geen programmagegevens beschikbaar
programme.desc: Geen programmagegevens beschikbaar.

programme.title: Animation
programme.desc: Série d'animation

programme.title: Killing Time
programme.desc: Nadat een gangster die twee moorden op zijn geweten heeft, wordt vrijgesproken, huurt agent Robert Bryant de bloedmooie huurmoordenaar Maria in om hem te doden. Als Bryant erachter komt dat hij de diensten van Maria niet kan betalen ziet hij zich genoodzaakt om een andere moordenaar, Madison, in te huren om Maria te vermoorden.

programme.title: Dark future ii
programme.desc: A horror anthology series exploring the dark side of technology.

programme.title: Echoes
programme.desc: On a distant planet, two blue collar workers transport a prisoner across a mining colony, only to discover she is not the real danger on board.

programme.title: Filmmaker spotlight - clemence poesy
programme.desc: Filmmaker Spotlight gives you an insight into the filmmaking process by screening a film followed by an exclusive interview with the creator. This time we spoke with director Clemence Poesy about her short, 'King of the Wind Demons'.

programme.title: Playground addiction
programme.desc: Street basketball is gaining popularity in Milan and playgrounds are being built everywhere in the city. But these are more than sport courts. Integration and mutual knowledge are keys to a creation of of larger social community.

programme.title: Mdudu boy
programme.desc: A small Kenyan street boy with a passion for football gets a stroke of luck when a brand new football falls off a bus on his coastal road.

programme.title: Guns 'n' hoses - 100 years of fdny vs nypd baseball
programme.desc: The origins of baseball are tracked back to the New York fire department.

programme.title: Zelos
programme.desc: Maria, a competitive woman in her late 30's orders a Zelos clone under the pretence of getting some help around the house so she can spend more time with her family, but more importantly to compete with her flawless friend Ari.

programme.title: The brewchurch
programme.desc: Castle Church Brewing Community, America's first modern-day church-owned brewery, combines faith-based fellowship and beer under the same roof. Patrons from all walks of life are welcome to grab a pint, join in prayer, or both.

programme.title: Killing Time
programme.desc: Nadat een gangster die twee moorden op zijn geweten heeft, wordt vrijgesproken, huurt agent Robert Bryant de bloedmooie huurmoordenaar Maria in om hem te doden. Als Bryant erachter komt dat hij de diensten van Maria niet kan betalen ziet hij zich genoodzaakt om een andere moordenaar, Madison, in te huren om Maria te vermoorden.

programme.title: Dark future ii
programme.desc: A horror anthology series exploring the dark side of technology.

programme.title: Echoes
programme.desc: On a distant planet, two blue collar workers transport a prisoner across a mining colony, only to discover she is not the real danger on board.

programme.title: Playground addiction
programme.desc: Street basketball is gaining popularity in Milan and playgrounds are being built everywhere in the city. But these are more than sport courts. Integration and mutual knowledge are keys to a creation of of larger social community.

programme.title: Mdudu boy
programme.desc: A small Kenyan street boy with a passion for football gets a stroke of luck when a brand new football falls off a bus on his coastal road.

programme.title: Guns 'n' hoses - 100 years of fdny vs nypd baseball
programme.desc: The origins of baseball are tracked back to the New York fire department.

programme.title: A fistful of rubbish
programme.desc: A Western eco documentary set in the Tabernas Desert in Spain, Europe's only desert. An area known for being the backdrop of famous Westerns, sadly, is being trashed. But locals are forming a posse and taking things into their own hands.

programme.title: An orgy in joshua tree
programme.desc: A nervous guy is invited to a weekend in Joshua Tree with three couples -- terrified (and intrigued) that he may have been invited to an orgy.

programme.title: Filmmaker spotlight - clemence poesy
programme.desc: Filmmaker Spotlight gives you an insight into the filmmaking process by screening a film followed by an exclusive interview with the creator. This time we spoke with director Clemence Poesy about her short, 'King of the Wind Demons'.

programme.title: Animation
programme.desc: Série d'animation

programme.title: Animation
programme.desc: Série d'animation

programme.title: Maria from the mangroves
programme.desc: The story of a woman who, while extracting oysters from the mangroves, also unearths memories, songs and ghosts.

programme.title: Off track betty
programme.desc: In an ever-changing corner of New York, a longtime resident realizes she no longer recognizes the neighbourhood she calls home and wonders whether it is time for her to move on.

programme.title: Man in the box
programme.desc: Locked up for decades in a maximum security prison, an old man tries to revive his glory days as a magician, putting into practice a perfect - but also very dangerous - escape plan.

programme.title: Follow me
programme.desc: Jasper (20), on the edge of adulthood , wanders around lost in the Port of Ghent. Fragments of a phone call betray a loss.

programme.title: Until the last train
programme.desc: Two women and a social mandate; a train station that brings them back together. This time, they must face their desires and make a decision.

programme.title: Fête prénatale
programme.desc: May and Christian are expecting their first child. What they're not expecting are the hordes of guests gathered in their dark apartment ready to throw them a surprise baby shower.

programme.title: Motel
programme.desc: A lonely rural motelier befriends one of her guests. For one night, the lives of someone who can't move, and another who can't stop, intersect.

programme.title: Zelos
programme.desc: Maria, a competitive woman in her late 30's orders a Zelos clone under the pretence of getting some help around the house so she can spend more time with her family, but more importantly to compete with her flawless friend Ari.

programme.title: The brewchurch
programme.desc: Castle Church Brewing Community, America's first modern-day church-owned brewery, combines faith-based fellowship and beer under the same roof. Patrons from all walks of life are welcome to grab a pint, join in prayer, or both.

programme.title: What you and i share with the salmon
programme.desc: During the difficult birth of his son, an anxious soon-to-be father reflects on all the moments of his sexual development that led to this and how it relates to the salmon run.

programme.title: Rendezvous with god
programme.desc: By the grace of Dieu, Sven and Chantal decide to spend one last night with their dad, whose funeral is happening the next day.

programme.title: Benim
programme.desc: Benim is the story of two culturally opposite North Americans seeking to overcome the prejudice of their own community. Amidst disapproval, bias social systems, and rigid customs, our two leads struggle to find their way.

programme.title: The Immortal
programme.desc: Charly Matteï zei de criminaliteit drie jaar geleden vaarwel en leidt sindsdien een vredig leven met zijn vrouw en twee kinderen. Op een ochtend wordt hij neergeschoten en voor dood achtergelaten op een parkeerterrein in de oude haven van Marseille. Tegen alle verwachtingen in overleeft Charly de aanval. Vanaf dat moment aast hij op wraak en start hij een klopjacht naar de daders en hun opdrachtgevers.

programme.title: Keep mum
programme.desc: A woman drunkenly wrecks her big family house. Soon it turns out that her past haunts her, throwing her into a whirlwind of emotions and projections as she tries to piece together what happened to her.

programme.title: The springfield three
programme.desc: Based on the 1992 disappearance, three women driving out of town to start a new life and escape their old one, horrifically encounter their inevitable fates.

programme.title: The daughters of virtue
programme.desc: What begins as a routine prayer group meeting soon morphs into a fanatical intervention when the group confronts Alice, one of their members, over a dark secret she is hiding.

programme.title: Cursed world problems
programme.desc: While visiting their parents, an expecting couple discover that there is an evil curse on their family's bloodline and their unborn child is in grave danger

programme.title: A fistful of rubbish
programme.desc: A Western eco documentary set in the Tabernas Desert in Spain, Europe's only desert. An area known for being the backdrop of famous Westerns, sadly, is being trashed. But locals are forming a posse and taking things into their own hands.

programme.title: An orgy in joshua tree
programme.desc: A nervous guy is invited to a weekend in Joshua Tree with three couples -- terrified (and intrigued) that he may have been invited to an orgy.

programme.title: This is what i look like naked
programme.desc: A burnt-out karaoke DJ at a dive bar in Brooklyn is overcome with envy and nostalgia after her childhood best friend-turned pop star adapts an old inside joke into a mega hit song.

programme.title: The fish out of water
programme.desc: Ashley sloggs through day after day in the office, fantasizing of quitting, telling off his boss, and asking out his crush, but can't find the nerve, but bushed to the edge, maybe, just maybe, he will.

programme.title: Brown note
programme.desc: Brown Note is the story of three friends on a quest to find the long rumored auditory anomaly of the same name.

programme.title: Coin catcher
programme.desc: Kelly No-Drop is a former world record Coin Catcher who has fallen on hard times. He frequents the Mongoose Club looking for odd jobs from the sadistic Boss-Boom. There he meets Dez, an accordion player who helps him regain his former glory

programme.title: Benim
programme.desc: Benim is the story of two culturally opposite North Americans seeking to overcome the prejudice of their own community. Amidst disapproval, bias social systems, and rigid customs, our two leads struggle to find their way.

programme.title: The Immortal
programme.desc: Charly Matteï zei de criminaliteit drie jaar geleden vaarwel en leidt sindsdien een vredig leven met zijn vrouw en twee kinderen. Op een ochtend wordt hij neergeschoten en voor dood achtergelaten op een parkeerterrein in de oude haven van Marseille. Tegen alle verwachtingen in overleeft Charly de aanval. Vanaf dat moment aast hij op wraak en start hij een klopjacht naar de daders en hun opdrachtgevers.

programme.title: Keep mum
programme.desc: A woman drunkenly wrecks her big family house. Soon it turns out that her past haunts her, throwing her into a whirlwind of emotions and projections as she tries to piece together what happened to her.

programme.title: The springfield three
programme.desc: Based on the 1992 disappearance, three women driving out of town to start a new life and escape their old one, horrifically encounter their inevitable fates.

programme.title: The daughters of virtue
programme.desc: What begins as a routine prayer group meeting soon morphs into a fanatical intervention when the group confronts Alice, one of their members, over a dark secret she is hiding.

programme.title: Cursed world problems
programme.desc: While visiting their parents, an expecting couple discover that there is an evil curse on their family's bloodline and their unborn child is in grave danger

programme.title: Wild youth
programme.desc: Following a breakdown, Cadence retreats to her childhood cottage seeking peace and clarity. Here she encounters Jude. The two share an evening of frivolity, discarding responsibility for distraction, and reason for impulse.

programme.title: The other way
programme.desc: A bride dares to take one last step before taking the leap.

programme.title: Zelos
programme.desc: Maria, a competitive woman in her late 30's orders a Zelos clone under the pretence of getting some help around the house so she can spend more time with her family, but more importantly to compete with her flawless friend Ari.

programme.title: The brewchurch
programme.desc: Castle Church Brewing Community, America's first modern-day church-owned brewery, combines faith-based fellowship and beer under the same roof. Patrons from all walks of life are welcome to grab a pint, join in prayer, or both.

programme.title: A fistful of rubbish
programme.desc: A Western eco documentary set in the Tabernas Desert in Spain, Europe's only desert. An area known for being the backdrop of famous Westerns, sadly, is being trashed. But locals are forming a posse and taking things into their own hands.

programme.title: An orgy in joshua tree
programme.desc: A nervous guy is invited to a weekend in Joshua Tree with three couples -- terrified (and intrigued) that he may have been invited to an orgy.

programme.title: Benim
programme.desc: Benim is the story of two culturally opposite North Americans seeking to overcome the prejudice of their own community. Amidst disapproval, bias social systems, and rigid customs, our two leads struggle to find their way.

programme.title: The Immortal
programme.desc: Charly Matteï zei de criminaliteit drie jaar geleden vaarwel en leidt sindsdien een vredig leven met zijn vrouw en twee kinderen. Op een ochtend wordt hij neergeschoten en voor dood achtergelaten op een parkeerterrein in de oude haven van Marseille. Tegen alle verwachtingen in overleeft Charly de aanval. Vanaf dat moment aast hij op wraak en start hij een klopjacht naar de daders en hun opdrachtgevers.

programme.title: Animation
programme.desc: Série d'animation

programme.title: Trick or receipt
programme.desc: A Halloween enthusiast gets a big surprise from an unconventional trick or treater.

programme.title: A very scary zombie halloween party
programme.desc: Maybel has been working hard to get into Lamda Eta Pi Soroity but when she finds out that she's only being used as their "slave," she vows to get revenge.

programme.title: Slick jimmy's incident
programme.desc: Time ticks away in a despairingly average diner as Jack, an eccentric vegetarian, tries to muster the courage to leave his home town for good.

programme.title: Birdeo & limet
programme.desc: Two rival electric scooter gangs battle in a scoot-off for control of the streets in Deep Ellum.

programme.title: Animation
programme.desc: Série d'animation

programme.title: Trick or receipt
programme.desc: A Halloween enthusiast gets a big surprise from an unconventional trick or treater.

programme.title: A very scary zombie halloween party
programme.desc: Maybel has been working hard to get into Lamda Eta Pi Soroity but when she finds out that she's only being used as their "slave," she vows to get revenge.

programme.title: Slick jimmy's incident
programme.desc: Time ticks away in a despairingly average diner as Jack, an eccentric vegetarian, tries to muster the courage to leave his home town for good.

programme.title: Birdeo & limet
programme.desc: Two rival electric scooter gangs battle in a scoot-off for control of the streets in Deep Ellum.

programme.title: My husband
programme.desc: Maria is a housewife married to Diego, a soccer fanatic. Maria realises that she is uncomfortable with her marriage and contemplates change, but Diego is oblivious to any problems in their marriage.

programme.title: Cracks
programme.desc: When a typical bourgeois couple needs to do business in an Arab neighbourhood, they are too afraid to park their expensive BMW. But when they get out of their car, they run into some Arab residents and a simple misunderstanding hopelessly grow into crippling fear.

programme.title: You're breaking up
programme.desc: A blushing bride overhears a disturbing conversation on her wedding day, and has to make the most difficult choice of her life.

programme.title: Kicks
programme.desc: Wanneer de jonge rapper Redouan door een politiekogel om het leven komt, dreigen zijn broer Saïd en getuige Aaliyah een speelbal te worden in de emoties van Marokkaanse en autochtone Nederlanders.

programme.title: Lady Luck
programme.desc: Een vrouw trouwt met een gokker in de hoop haar kersverse man terug op het rechte pad te brengen, maar de zaken lopen niet zoals ze vooraf had gepland.

programme.title: The kicksled choir
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Gabriel dreams of joining the Kicksled Choir, a local caroling group known for raising donations for the refugees. But he faces an unexpected hurdle after he witnesses his father's alarming aggression towards the very people he wants to help.

programme.title: Honey do
programme.desc: A man sets out to complete one last honey do list.

programme.title: Being keegan
programme.desc: When a tormented naval officer returns home to Liverpool, the city becomes a landscape for atonement as he is forced to confront a traumatic childhood event.

programme.title: Future boyfriend
programme.desc: Stuart and Kaylie are enjoying their third date, when Stuart reveals a secret that threatens to derail their budding relationship.

programme.title: Henrietta bulkowski
programme.desc: A determined young woman, crippled with a severe hunchback, will stop at nothing to fulfill her dream of seeing the world. This is the story of how she finds happiness.

programme.title: Rise of a star
programme.desc: Emma is about to be the new ballerina, but something upsets her. A secret. A secret liable to undermine what she has spent a whole life on.

programme.title: What you and i share with the salmon
programme.desc: During the difficult birth of his son, an anxious soon-to-be father reflects on all the moments of his sexual development that led to this and how it relates to the salmon run.

programme.title: Rendezvous with god
programme.desc: By the grace of Dieu, Sven and Chantal decide to spend one last night with their dad, whose funeral is happening the next day.

programme.title: Lili
programme.desc: Lili knows she has to nail this audition. The man she auditions for knows this too. Thus begins an uncomfortable cat-and-mouse game about power.

programme.title: Keep mum
programme.desc: A woman drunkenly wrecks her big family house. Soon it turns out that her past haunts her, throwing her into a whirlwind of emotions and projections as she tries to piece together what happened to her.

programme.title: A quiet room in walthamstow
programme.desc: When a young woman moves to a room in London, she must figure out what is behind the strange happenings in her new house share before she becomes another victim of the mysterious presence living upstairs.

programme.title: Akuji - devil's board
programme.desc: A producer recruits 6 students to conduct experiments to determine if supernatural forces can truly manifest themselves when playing with the Akuji board.

programme.title: The Cookie Thief
programme.desc: A silent duel over a bag of cookie set in a train station.

programme.title: Cat & mouse
programme.desc: "Cat & Mouse", portrays a brief narrative of the dance performed when predator meets prey. Jim Henson (The Muppets) used collage and drawings to animate a story, displaying his unique visual shorthand used to create distinctive characters.

programme.title: The butterfly, the harp, and the timepiece
programme.desc: At a magical pawn shop a vagabond, an office worker, and a former executive reach for the symbols of their waning dreams. Circumstances bind their paths together and lead to a culmination of fulfillment and disappointment.

programme.title: Deathless
programme.desc: British P.I. John Ray is on the trail of alleged murderer Max Serloom, who has kidnapped John's wife. Only one mancan win the deadly duel of wits and bullets that follows, played out in a deserted London warehouse.

programme.title: Ripples
programme.desc: "Ripples" explores how ideas are formed and the workings of the mind. Using a variety of images rapidly cut together, the film visualizes the mind's eye of an architect as he considers his next project.

programme.title: Wheels That Go
programme.desc: "Wheels That Go" explores how children experience the world and make sense of the things they see.

programme.title: Our next caller
programme.desc: A failing legal advice radio program gets a sudden boost in popularity when a mysterious caller offers a violent proposal.

programme.title: The Youth in Us
programme.desc: A young couple confronts a painful future by looking to the past.

programme.title: A fistful of rubbish
programme.desc: A Western eco documentary set in the Tabernas Desert in Spain, Europe's only desert. An area known for being the backdrop of famous Westerns, sadly, is being trashed. But locals are forming a posse and taking things into their own hands.

programme.title: An orgy in joshua tree
programme.desc: A nervous guy is invited to a weekend in Joshua Tree with three couples -- terrified (and intrigued) that he may have been invited to an orgy.

programme.title: Watch in color
programme.desc: In our commitment to providing a platform for all filmmakers, we're showcasing a collection of films made by and starring filmmakers of color; in projects that prove just how imaginative and inclusive shorts can be.

programme.title: Lili
programme.desc: Lili knows she has to nail this audition. The man she auditions for knows this too. Thus begins an uncomfortable cat-and-mouse game about power.

programme.title: Keep mum
programme.desc: A woman drunkenly wrecks her big family house. Soon it turns out that her past haunts her, throwing her into a whirlwind of emotions and projections as she tries to piece together what happened to her.

programme.title: A quiet room in walthamstow
programme.desc: When a young woman moves to a room in London, she must figure out what is behind the strange happenings in her new house share before she becomes another victim of the mysterious presence living upstairs.

programme.title: Akuji - devil's board
programme.desc: A producer recruits 6 students to conduct experiments to determine if supernatural forces can truly manifest themselves when playing with the Akuji board.

programme.title: Filmmaker spotlight - clemence poesy
programme.desc: Filmmaker Spotlight gives you an insight into the filmmaking process by screening a film followed by an exclusive interview with the creator. This time we spoke with director Clemence Poesy about her short, 'King of the Wind Demons'.

programme.title: The Cookie Thief
programme.desc: A silent duel over a bag of cookie set in a train station.

programme.title: Cat & mouse
programme.desc: "Cat & Mouse", portrays a brief narrative of the dance performed when predator meets prey. Jim Henson (The Muppets) used collage and drawings to animate a story, displaying his unique visual shorthand used to create distinctive characters.

programme.title: The butterfly, the harp, and the timepiece
programme.desc: At a magical pawn shop a vagabond, an office worker, and a former executive reach for the symbols of their waning dreams. Circumstances bind their paths together and lead to a culmination of fulfillment and disappointment.

programme.title: Deathless
programme.desc: British P.I. John Ray is on the trail of alleged murderer Max Serloom, who has kidnapped John's wife. Only one mancan win the deadly duel of wits and bullets that follows, played out in a deserted London warehouse.

programme.title: Ripples
programme.desc: "Ripples" explores how ideas are formed and the workings of the mind. Using a variety of images rapidly cut together, the film visualizes the mind's eye of an architect as he considers his next project.

programme.title: Wheels That Go
programme.desc: "Wheels That Go" explores how children experience the world and make sense of the things they see.

programme.title: Our next caller
programme.desc: A failing legal advice radio program gets a sudden boost in popularity when a mysterious caller offers a violent proposal.

programme.title: The Youth in Us
programme.desc: A young couple confronts a painful future by looking to the past.

programme.title: A fistful of rubbish
programme.desc: A Western eco documentary set in the Tabernas Desert in Spain, Europe's only desert. An area known for being the backdrop of famous Westerns, sadly, is being trashed. But locals are forming a posse and taking things into their own hands.

programme.title: An orgy in joshua tree
programme.desc: A nervous guy is invited to a weekend in Joshua Tree with three couples -- terrified (and intrigued) that he may have been invited to an orgy.

programme.title: Animation
programme.desc: Série d'animation

programme.title: Animation
programme.desc: Série d'animation

programme.title: Cabu cabu 011
programme.desc: Mamadou is an african young man living in Turin and working as a cabu-cabu, a kind of abusive taxi driver used by the "black" community.

programme.title: Love for hire
programme.desc: A sociopathic millennial seeks the help of Greek God Cupid to seduce her crush. Things do not go as expected.

programme.title: Kiddo
programme.desc: A tale of an innocent child with a malevolent mind.

programme.title: Intermedium
programme.desc: An obsessive-compulsive teenager struggles to learn the value of compromise while adjusting to her new home (and butting heads with the ghost of the boy who haunts it).

programme.title: Rest of us
programme.desc: A teenage boy seeks an escape from his reality; but his reality is harder to escape than he thought.

programme.title: The man from the tiber
programme.desc: A man wonders if he can save two innocent creatures from a miserable life by taking them into another world.

programme.title: Egg
programme.desc: Voedsel, binnenlandse veiligheid, seksueel genot, het zijn elementen die op verschillende manieren kunnen worden ervaren.

programme.title: Shells
programme.desc: Buenos Aires, December 2, 1990. The Carapintada uprising against the democratic government is about to begin. Six-year-old Tobias keeps ants in jars while staying with his father who takes part in the organization of the uprising.

programme.title: Filmmaker spotlight - clemence poesy
programme.desc: Filmmaker Spotlight gives you an insight into the filmmaking process by screening a film followed by an exclusive interview with the creator. This time we spoke with director Clemence Poesy about her short, 'King of the Wind Demons'.

programme.title: Viewers' Choice
programme.desc: Welcome to Viewers' Choice. In this show we'll be reviewing the best films you've been watching on our Video on Demand services. Presented by Johanna Botta.

programme.title: Filmmaker spotlight - samantha shada
programme.desc: Filmmaker Spotlight gives you an insight into the filmmaking process by screening a film followed by an exclusive interview with the creator. This time we spoke with writer & director Samantha Shada about her short, 'Beauty School'.

programme.title: A fistful of rubbish
programme.desc: A Western eco documentary set in the Tabernas Desert in Spain, Europe's only desert. An area known for being the backdrop of famous Westerns, sadly, is being trashed. But locals are forming a posse and taking things into their own hands.

programme.title: An orgy in joshua tree
programme.desc: A nervous guy is invited to a weekend in Joshua Tree with three couples -- terrified (and intrigued) that he may have been invited to an orgy.

programme.title: The devil's toy
programme.desc: During WWII where atrocious acts were committed, a Satan-worshiping Nazi protects a box that is truly the devil incarnate. The box ends up in the hands of an American soldier who does everything in his power to destroy it.

programme.title: Killing Time
programme.desc: Nadat een gangster die twee moorden op zijn geweten heeft, wordt vrijgesproken, huurt agent Robert Bryant de bloedmooie huurmoordenaar Maria in om hem te doden. Als Bryant erachter komt dat hij de diensten van Maria niet kan betalen ziet hij zich genoodzaakt om een andere moordenaar, Madison, in te huren om Maria te vermoorden.

programme.title: Scratch
programme.desc: When a repressed 1950s housewife is left alone by her philandering husband, she makes a horrifying discovery about the noises in the house that are coming from the walls.

programme.title: Helsinki mansplaining massacre
programme.desc: One woman desperately struggles to survive a horde of men with frail egos, who just want to explain everything to her.

programme.title: Zelos
programme.desc: Maria, a competitive woman in her late 30's orders a Zelos clone under the pretence of getting some help around the house so she can spend more time with her family, but more importantly to compete with her flawless friend Ari.

programme.title: The brewchurch
programme.desc: Castle Church Brewing Community, America's first modern-day church-owned brewery, combines faith-based fellowship and beer under the same roof. Patrons from all walks of life are welcome to grab a pint, join in prayer, or both.

programme.title: Viewers' Choice
programme.desc: Welcome to Viewers' Choice. In this show we'll be reviewing the best films you've been watching on our Video on Demand services. Presented by Johanna Botta.

programme.title: A fistful of rubbish
programme.desc: A Western eco documentary set in the Tabernas Desert in Spain, Europe's only desert. An area known for being the backdrop of famous Westerns, sadly, is being trashed. But locals are forming a posse and taking things into their own hands.

programme.title: An orgy in joshua tree
programme.desc: A nervous guy is invited to a weekend in Joshua Tree with three couples -- terrified (and intrigued) that he may have been invited to an orgy.

programme.title: Killing Time
programme.desc: Nadat een gangster die twee moorden op zijn geweten heeft, wordt vrijgesproken, huurt agent Robert Bryant de bloedmooie huurmoordenaar Maria in om hem te doden. Als Bryant erachter komt dat hij de diensten van Maria niet kan betalen ziet hij zich genoodzaakt om een andere moordenaar, Madison, in te huren om Maria te vermoorden.

programme.title: Scratch
programme.desc: When a repressed 1950s housewife is left alone by her philandering husband, she makes a horrifying discovery about the noises in the house that are coming from the walls.

programme.title: Helsinki mansplaining massacre
programme.desc: One woman desperately struggles to survive a horde of men with frail egos, who just want to explain everything to her.

programme.title: Skin of the night
programme.desc: EVERY NIGHT A DUMB AND DEAF MAN, WHOSE INCREDIBLE AGILITY IS EXPLOITED IN CLANDESTINE FIGHTS ORGANIZED BY THE MAFIA WANDRES WITHOUT AIM IN THE CITY.

programme.title: Animation
programme.desc: Série d'animation

programme.title: Animation
programme.desc: Série d'animation

programme.title: Jump
programme.desc: De dochter van een gangster staat op het punt zelfmoord te plegen, maar ze wordt gered door een man die op zoek is naar zijn vermiste broer. Samen gaan ze op zoek naar antwoorden.

programme.title: It feels like spring
programme.desc: A young woman tries to convince her doctor she's from a parallel dimension as reality crumbles around them.

programme.title: Adagio
programme.desc: Two guys who have go out from prison receive a job offer: they have to get rid of a car and in return they will receive six thousand euros.

programme.title: Whisper
programme.desc: Max en Roxanne willen samen een restaurant beginnen. Wanneer de bank hen een lening weigert, ontvoeren ze een rijk jongetje om via hem aan de nodige middelen te geraken. Maar de jongen is niet zo onschuldig als hij eruitziet.

programme.title: 70 days
programme.desc: On March 9, 2020, to counter the spread of the COVID-19 virus, the Italian government imposed home isolation on all citizens. During the next 70 days, the virus weakened; other diseases blossomed.

programme.title: Lightning
programme.desc: Quirky musician Sean moves to London and meets Summer, a deaf girl who dreams of becoming a pilot. As their clumsy friendship evolves, Summer discovers that Sean has an incredible secret.

programme.title: Dela
programme.desc: Dela does not understand why the kids at school make fun of her name and her hair. But she is determined to sort it out.

programme.title: Visiting charlie
programme.desc: A divorced Charlie Chaplin street impersonator realizes his 12-year-old son has outgrown his clownery and is forced to get rid of his masks to connect with him in a new way.

programme.title: The audition
programme.desc: Carlos is a violinist who is about to have an important audition, but when he sees a more polished violinist whom he admires at the same audition, he is overcome with nerves.

programme.title: Honey do
programme.desc: A man sets out to complete one last honey do list.

programme.title: Minah
programme.desc: A married Islamic woman falls in love with her colleague.

programme.title: Sci-fi summer-existensial
programme.desc: Welcome to Sci-Fi Summer. The show highlighting sci-fi themed short films that are truly out of this world. With peril surrounding our heroes, their greatest challenge could be themselves...This is EXISTENTIAL!!!

programme.title: Films by her - love is all around
programme.desc: The best films by female filmmakers. This time we bring you romantic shorts.

programme.title: Follow me
programme.desc: Jasper (20), on the edge of adulthood , wanders around lost in the Port of Ghent. Fragments of a phone call betray a loss.

programme.title: Cadet
programme.desc: If it were easy, everyone would do it - is the mantra Steve's father uses to maximise his performance on the running track. But his extreme motivation attempts go way too far..

programme.title: Filmmaker spotlight - samantha shada
programme.desc: Filmmaker Spotlight gives you an insight into the filmmaking process by screening a film followed by an exclusive interview with the creator. This time we spoke with writer & director Samantha Shada about her short, 'Beauty School'.

programme.title: The midnight hour - concealed longings
programme.desc: Welcome to the Midnight Hour, the show bringing you everything from blood and guts to satisfy all your horror film needs. Tonight, tensions rise as our leads have to deal with the elephant in the room and it could have disastrous results...

programme.title: Sci-fi summer-existensial
programme.desc: Welcome to Sci-Fi Summer. The show highlighting sci-fi themed short films that are truly out of this world. With peril surrounding our heroes, their greatest challenge could be themselves...This is EXISTENTIAL!!!

programme.title: Films by her - love is all around
programme.desc: The best films by female filmmakers. This time we bring you romantic shorts.

programme.title: The midnight hour - concealed longings
programme.desc: Welcome to the Midnight Hour, the show bringing you everything from blood and guts to satisfy all your horror film needs. Tonight, tensions rise as our leads have to deal with the elephant in the room and it could have disastrous results...

programme.title: Sci-fi summer-existensial
programme.desc: Welcome to Sci-Fi Summer. The show highlighting sci-fi themed short films that are truly out of this world. With peril surrounding our heroes, their greatest challenge could be themselves...This is EXISTENTIAL!!!

programme.title: Films by her - love is all around
programme.desc: The best films by female filmmakers. This time we bring you romantic shorts.

programme.title: Animation
programme.desc: Série d'animation

programme.title: Animation
programme.desc: Série d'animation

programme.title: Achoo
programme.desc: In ancient China, a little dragon who can't breathe fire will fight to overcome his weakness.

programme.title: Digital romance
programme.desc: In Brutal Bullet, a computer game, our hero Kane Skullhead lives by 'shoot first, ask later'. When a virus infects the computer's binary system, Kane finds a new, deadly antagonist in the antivirus threatening to take away his beating heart.

programme.title: Saint plantain
programme.desc: The appearance of a face in a burned fried banana by Doña Tere revives the hope of the people. However, the return home of his son Jacinto and the visit of the priest, puts at risk in everything that Tere has achieved thanks to the "saint".

programme.title: Trick or receipt
programme.desc: A Halloween enthusiast gets a big surprise from an unconventional trick or treater.

programme.title: A very scary zombie halloween party
programme.desc: Maybel has been working hard to get into Lamda Eta Pi Soroity but when she finds out that she's only being used as their "slave," she vows to get revenge.

programme.title: Slick jimmy's incident
programme.desc: Time ticks away in a despairingly average diner as Jack, an eccentric vegetarian, tries to muster the courage to leave his home town for good.

programme.title: Birdeo & limet
programme.desc: Two rival electric scooter gangs battle in a scoot-off for control of the streets in Deep Ellum.

programme.title: Punta cana
programme.desc: As we get older we become wiser but also weaker, and it is then that we have to face reality.

programme.title: Rocky
programme.desc: Pablito is desperate to raise money for his brother's emergency treatment, and so takes his fighting cock Rocky to town to take on Ajiseco, the roughest rooster in the region. Will fate smile on him?

programme.title: Carousel
programme.desc: A husband learns a valuable lesson from his wife.

programme.title: Land tides
programme.desc: Laura, a heartbroken teenager from Santiago, is on holiday in the southern Chilean archipelago of Chiloe when she encounters a group of local seaweed collector women, with whom she shares places and stories.

programme.title: Best before end
programme.desc: Francois, 65 years old, lives alone in his flat. He has no one to talk to. One morning he's sitting on his armchair facing his window. He remains still but his inner voice is giving us his mood. How long will he stay immobile staring at his window?

programme.title: Cannes special - the factory - nordic
programme.desc: Since 2013, The Cannes Directors' Fortnight has brought together filmmakers from different countries to collaborate on short films. This is the Cannes Special, The Factory. In this episode, we bring you shorts from the Nordic region.

programme.title: Pitch to premiere - sieda
programme.desc: Pitch to Premiere follows previous winners of the 'The Pitch' competition as they complete their project. This time we're going to focus on the winning film, 'Sieda' by The Pitch: Cannes 2018 winner Vanessa Pellegrin.

programme.title: Killing Time
programme.desc: Nadat een gangster die twee moorden op zijn geweten heeft, wordt vrijgesproken, huurt agent Robert Bryant de bloedmooie huurmoordenaar Maria in om hem te doden. Als Bryant erachter komt dat hij de diensten van Maria niet kan betalen ziet hij zich genoodzaakt om een andere moordenaar, Madison, in te huren om Maria te vermoorden.

programme.title: Dark future ii
programme.desc: A horror anthology series exploring the dark side of technology.

programme.title: Echoes
programme.desc: On a distant planet, two blue collar workers transport a prisoner across a mining colony, only to discover she is not the real danger on board.

programme.title: Cannes special - the factory - nordic
programme.desc: Since 2013, The Cannes Directors' Fortnight has brought together filmmakers from different countries to collaborate on short films. This is the Cannes Special, The Factory. In this episode, we bring you shorts from the Nordic region.

programme.title: Killing Time
programme.desc: Nadat een gangster die twee moorden op zijn geweten heeft, wordt vrijgesproken, huurt agent Robert Bryant de bloedmooie huurmoordenaar Maria in om hem te doden. Als Bryant erachter komt dat hij de diensten van Maria niet kan betalen ziet hij zich genoodzaakt om een andere moordenaar, Madison, in te huren om Maria te vermoorden.

programme.title: Dark future ii
programme.desc: A horror anthology series exploring the dark side of technology.

programme.title: Echoes
programme.desc: On a distant planet, two blue collar workers transport a prisoner across a mining colony, only to discover she is not the real danger on board.

programme.title: Cannes special - the factory - nordic
programme.desc: Since 2013, The Cannes Directors' Fortnight has brought together filmmakers from different countries to collaborate on short films. This is the Cannes Special, The Factory. In this episode, we bring you shorts from the Nordic region.

programme.title: Animation
programme.desc: Série d'animation

programme.title: The midnight hour - growing threat
programme.desc: Welcome to the Midnight Hour, the show bringing you everything from blood and guts to boobs and butts to satisfy all your horror film needs. Tonight tensions rise to a boiling point as our leads slowly discover they're far from safe...

programme.title: Rock the shorts
programme.desc: Rock the Shorts on ShortsTV is highlighting the best short films that have previously played as part of the rock the shorts film festival. This will also include insight into this year's films with interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: The midnight hour - growing threat
programme.desc: Welcome to the Midnight Hour, the show bringing you everything from blood and guts to boobs and butts to satisfy all your horror film needs. Tonight tensions rise to a boiling point as our leads slowly discover they're far from safe...

programme.title: Rock the shorts
programme.desc: Rock the Shorts on ShortsTV is highlighting the best short films that have previously played as part of the rock the shorts film festival. This will also include insight into this year's films with interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Animation
programme.desc: Série d'animation

programme.title: Johnny's rocket
programme.desc: Stranded on a desert island, Johnny must break in to his locked flare gun case before an airplane flies by again.

programme.title: Puddle
programme.desc: Every child is a dreamer, dreaming of new worlds and adventures. Adults would give anything to go back in their childhood, to feel free and do something childish...

programme.title: Jubilee
programme.desc: A royal guard and a corgi chase the queen's hat as the wind blows it through london.

programme.title: The green bird
programme.desc: A green bird lays its first egg. It's going to try everything to make it hatch.

programme.title: Animation
programme.desc: Série d'animation

programme.title: Johnny's rocket
programme.desc: Stranded on a desert island, Johnny must break in to his locked flare gun case before an airplane flies by again.

programme.title: Puddle
programme.desc: Every child is a dreamer, dreaming of new worlds and adventures. Adults would give anything to go back in their childhood, to feel free and do something childish...

programme.title: Jubilee
programme.desc: A royal guard and a corgi chase the queen's hat as the wind blows it through london.

programme.title: The green bird
programme.desc: A green bird lays its first egg. It's going to try everything to make it hatch.

programme.title: Achoo
programme.desc: In ancient China, a little dragon who can't breathe fire will fight to overcome his weakness.

programme.title: Digital romance
programme.desc: In Brutal Bullet, a computer game, our hero Kane Skullhead lives by 'shoot first, ask later'. When a virus infects the computer's binary system, Kane finds a new, deadly antagonist in the antivirus threatening to take away his beating heart.

programme.title: Saint plantain
programme.desc: The appearance of a face in a burned fried banana by Doña Tere revives the hope of the people. However, the return home of his son Jacinto and the visit of the priest, puts at risk in everything that Tere has achieved thanks to the "saint".

programme.title: Soul mate
programme.desc: A boy rushes home from school and makes an unexpected decision.

programme.title: Carousel
programme.desc: A husband learns a valuable lesson from his wife.

programme.title: Nelly
programme.desc: A car drives through the snow. Behind the wheel is Nelly. She is thirteen years old. Nelly wants to go home. Separating her from her goal are three questions, two keys, a diving tower and a racing heart.

programme.title: Class trip
programme.desc: Elin tries to fit in at her new school where the classmates are preparing for a skiing trip. Soon she realizes that children are divided into richer and poorer, and she doesn't know where she belongs.

programme.title: Lost and Found
programme.desc: Vijf jaar geleden verdween Janets dochter Katie onder mysterieuze omstandigheden. Groot is Janets verbazing wanneer Katie plots weer voor de deur staat. Het meisje is echter zwaar getraumatiseerd.

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Een groep vrienden die elkaar regelmatig ontmoet voor game-avonden, raakt verstrikt in een echt mysterie wanneer de louche broer van één van hen schijnbaar om te lachen wordt ontvoerd door gevaarlijke gangsters.

programme.title: Samoeraai
programme.desc: The young Ivan lives with his eccentric single mother in Rotterdam. When he receives a samurai sword one day, all his hopes and dreams become reality.

programme.title: The man who killed james bond
programme.desc: Fabrizio is a petty thief from St. Basil, a seedy suburb in Rome. He is finally facing the man who ruined his life, James Bond. The fascinating British spy was an idol for Fabrizio, who didn't miss any of his countless action movies.

programme.title: Hold on
programme.desc: Window cleaner Dennis falls from the 40th floor of a high rise and gets stuck outside the window of Debbie, who is getting ready for a date. The two have an awkward conversation through the soundproof glass.

programme.title: Filmmaker spotlight - james bort
programme.desc: Filmmaker Spotlight gives you an insight into the filmmaking process by screening a film followed by an exclusive interview with the creator. This time we spoke with director James Bort about his short film -Rise of a Star'.

programme.title: Crime - murder, she wrote
programme.desc: Welcome to Crime. The show that bands together a group of misfit movies and presents them to you like a line up at a police station. Tonight baddies will kick the bucket in a batch of short films sure to slay.

programme.title: Biagio
programme.desc: Biagio, a kids show funny red puppet, stars in a gritty film about crime and addiction.

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Een groep vrienden die elkaar regelmatig ontmoet voor game-avonden, raakt verstrikt in een echt mysterie wanneer de louche broer van één van hen schijnbaar om te lachen wordt ontvoerd door gevaarlijke gangsters.

programme.title: Samoeraai
programme.desc: The young Ivan lives with his eccentric single mother in Rotterdam. When he receives a samurai sword one day, all his hopes and dreams become reality.

programme.title: The man who killed james bond
programme.desc: Fabrizio is a petty thief from St. Basil, a seedy suburb in Rome. He is finally facing the man who ruined his life, James Bond. The fascinating British spy was an idol for Fabrizio, who didn't miss any of his countless action movies.

programme.title: Hold on
programme.desc: Window cleaner Dennis falls from the 40th floor of a high rise and gets stuck outside the window of Debbie, who is getting ready for a date. The two have an awkward conversation through the soundproof glass.

programme.title: Ringfinger
programme.desc: A couple must decide what they are willing to sacrifice for the future of their relationship.

programme.title: Coulrophobia
programme.desc: After a tragic event in his past takes both his parents, Luke is left with a lifelong fear of clowns. Years later, he meets a beautiful woman at a party that he finally connects with, but she has a secret that may complicate things.

programme.title: The devil's toy
programme.desc: During WWII where atrocious acts were committed, a Satan-worshiping Nazi protects a box that is truly the devil incarnate. The box ends up in the hands of an American soldier who does everything in his power to destroy it.

programme.title: Night of the fluffet
programme.desc: A harmless puppet... a children's toy. How wrong they were.

programme.title: On my way to hell
programme.desc: After purchasing a mysterious box from his dealer, Cory and his girlfriend Annie are ready for the high of their lives.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: An isolated chalet in a snowy forest, a man blinded by alcohol, a woman unable to rebel, and an 8-year-old child troubled and dark. The silent night is broken with cries: the start of a terrible nightmare!

programme.title: Filmmaker spotlight - james bort
programme.desc: Filmmaker Spotlight gives you an insight into the filmmaking process by screening a film followed by an exclusive interview with the creator. This time we spoke with director James Bort about his short film -Rise of a Star'.

programme.title: Crime - murder, she wrote
programme.desc: Welcome to Crime. The show that bands together a group of misfit movies and presents them to you like a line up at a police station. Tonight baddies will kick the bucket in a batch of short films sure to slay.

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Een groep vrienden die elkaar regelmatig ontmoet voor game-avonden, raakt verstrikt in een echt mysterie wanneer de louche broer van één van hen schijnbaar om te lachen wordt ontvoerd door gevaarlijke gangsters.

programme.title: Samoeraai
programme.desc: The young Ivan lives with his eccentric single mother in Rotterdam. When he receives a samurai sword one day, all his hopes and dreams become reality.

programme.title: The man who killed james bond
programme.desc: Fabrizio is a petty thief from St. Basil, a seedy suburb in Rome. He is finally facing the man who ruined his life, James Bond. The fascinating British spy was an idol for Fabrizio, who didn't miss any of his countless action movies.

programme.title: Ringfinger
programme.desc: A couple must decide what they are willing to sacrifice for the future of their relationship.

programme.title: Coulrophobia
programme.desc: After a tragic event in his past takes both his parents, Luke is left with a lifelong fear of clowns. Years later, he meets a beautiful woman at a party that he finally connects with, but she has a secret that may complicate things.

programme.title: The devil's toy
programme.desc: During WWII where atrocious acts were committed, a Satan-worshiping Nazi protects a box that is truly the devil incarnate. The box ends up in the hands of an American soldier who does everything in his power to destroy it.

programme.title: Night of the fluffet
programme.desc: A harmless puppet... a children's toy. How wrong they were.

programme.title: On my way to hell
programme.desc: After purchasing a mysterious box from his dealer, Cory and his girlfriend Annie are ready for the high of their lives.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: An isolated chalet in a snowy forest, a man blinded by alcohol, a woman unable to rebel, and an 8-year-old child troubled and dark. The silent night is broken with cries: the start of a terrible nightmare!

programme.title: Crime - murder, she wrote
programme.desc: Welcome to Crime. The show that bands together a group of misfit movies and presents them to you like a line up at a police station. Tonight baddies will kick the bucket in a batch of short films sure to slay.

programme.title: Biagio
programme.desc: Biagio, a kids show funny red puppet, stars in a gritty film about crime and addiction.

programme.title: Filmmaker spotlight - james bort
programme.desc: Filmmaker Spotlight gives you an insight into the filmmaking process by screening a film followed by an exclusive interview with the creator. This time we spoke with director James Bort about his short film -Rise of a Star'.

programme.title: Animation
programme.desc: Série d'animation

programme.title: Animation
programme.desc: Série d'animation

programme.title: Hold on
programme.desc: Window cleaner Dennis falls from the 40th floor of a high rise and gets stuck outside the window of Debbie, who is getting ready for a date. The two have an awkward conversation through the soundproof glass.

programme.title: The roll of a roll
programme.desc: The stop motion adventures of a roll of camera film.

programme.title: The fear inside
programme.desc: An agoraphobic woman encounters unexplained events in her home and wrestles with whether her need to escape them outweighs her paralyzing fear.

programme.title: Don't let it out
programme.desc: A young woman is trapped in an abusive relationship and her only escape is through a demonic force.

programme.title: L'oiseau bleu
programme.desc: A colourful cast of characters spend a memorable night at l'Oiseau Bleu, a famous restaurant by the sea in the suburb of Tunis.

programme.title: Best before end
programme.desc: Francois, 65 years old, lives alone in his flat. He has no one to talk to. One morning he's sitting on his armchair facing his window. He remains still but his inner voice is giving us his mood. How long will he stay immobile staring at his window?

programme.title: Punta cana
programme.desc: As we get older we become wiser but also weaker, and it is then that we have to face reality.

programme.title: Rocky
programme.desc: Pablito is desperate to raise money for his brother's emergency treatment, and so takes his fighting cock Rocky to town to take on Ajiseco, the roughest rooster in the region. Will fate smile on him?

programme.title: Carousel
programme.desc: A husband learns a valuable lesson from his wife.

programme.title: Land tides
programme.desc: Laura, a heartbroken teenager from Santiago, is on holiday in the southern Chilean archipelago of Chiloe when she encounters a group of local seaweed collector women, with whom she shares places and stories.

programme.title: Best before end
programme.desc: Francois, 65 years old, lives alone in his flat. He has no one to talk to. One morning he's sitting on his armchair facing his window. He remains still but his inner voice is giving us his mood. How long will he stay immobile staring at his window?

programme.title: To garbo and lenin
programme.desc: Greta Garbo and Vladimir Lenin meet at PUB's department store in Stockholm 1917. They both have lost a dream, which leads to a conversation that lasts all day while they are walking through the city.

programme.title: Sometimes, i think about dying
programme.desc: Fran likes to think about dying. When she makes a guy in the office laugh, he wants more - a movie date, a slice of pie, a conversation. But if dating him means learning to live, she's pretty sure she can't do that.

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Een groep vrienden die elkaar regelmatig ontmoet voor game-avonden, raakt verstrikt in een echt mysterie wanneer de louche broer van één van hen schijnbaar om te lachen wordt ontvoerd door gevaarlijke gangsters.

programme.title: Samoeraai
programme.desc: The young Ivan lives with his eccentric single mother in Rotterdam. When he receives a samurai sword one day, all his hopes and dreams become reality.

programme.title: The man who killed james bond
programme.desc: Fabrizio is a petty thief from St. Basil, a seedy suburb in Rome. He is finally facing the man who ruined his life, James Bond. The fascinating British spy was an idol for Fabrizio, who didn't miss any of his countless action movies.

programme.title: A weekend in july
programme.desc: Oscar invites his girlfriend Anna over when his family leaves town for the weekend. Seeing each-other after months of separation, they navigate the time together making efforts to rekindle the fire.

programme.title: Killing Time
programme.desc: Nadat een gangster die twee moorden op zijn geweten heeft, wordt vrijgesproken, huurt agent Robert Bryant de bloedmooie huurmoordenaar Maria in om hem te doden. Als Bryant erachter komt dat hij de diensten van Maria niet kan betalen ziet hij zich genoodzaakt om een andere moordenaar, Madison, in te huren om Maria te vermoorden.

programme.title: Dark future ii
programme.desc: A horror anthology series exploring the dark side of technology.

programme.title: Echoes
programme.desc: On a distant planet, two blue collar workers transport a prisoner across a mining colony, only to discover she is not the real danger on board.

programme.title: Biagio
programme.desc: Biagio, a kids show funny red puppet, stars in a gritty film about crime and addiction.

programme.title: Ringfinger
programme.desc: A couple must decide what they are willing to sacrifice for the future of their relationship.

programme.title: Coulrophobia
programme.desc: After a tragic event in his past takes both his parents, Luke is left with a lifelong fear of clowns. Years later, he meets a beautiful woman at a party that he finally connects with, but she has a secret that may complicate things.

programme.title: The devil's toy
programme.desc: During WWII where atrocious acts were committed, a Satan-worshiping Nazi protects a box that is truly the devil incarnate. The box ends up in the hands of an American soldier who does everything in his power to destroy it.

programme.title: Night of the fluffet
programme.desc: A harmless puppet... a children's toy. How wrong they were.

programme.title: On my way to hell
programme.desc: After purchasing a mysterious box from his dealer, Cory and his girlfriend Annie are ready for the high of their lives.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: An isolated chalet in a snowy forest, a man blinded by alcohol, a woman unable to rebel, and an 8-year-old child troubled and dark. The silent night is broken with cries: the start of a terrible nightmare!

programme.title: Rock the shorts
programme.desc: Rock the Shorts on ShortsTV is highlighting the best short films that have previously played as part of the rock the shorts film festival. This will also include insight into this year's films with interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Animation
programme.desc: Série d'animation

programme.title: Keep mum
programme.desc: A woman drunkenly wrecks her big family house. Soon it turns out that her past haunts her, throwing her into a whirlwind of emotions and projections as she tries to piece together what happened to her.

programme.title: The springfield three
programme.desc: Based on the 1992 disappearance, three women driving out of town to start a new life and escape their old one, horrifically encounter their inevitable fates.

programme.title: The daughters of virtue
programme.desc: What begins as a routine prayer group meeting soon morphs into a fanatical intervention when the group confronts Alice, one of their members, over a dark secret she is hiding.

programme.title: Cursed world problems
programme.desc: While visiting their parents, an expecting couple discover that there is an evil curse on their family's bloodline and their unborn child is in grave danger

programme.title: The Voorman Problem
programme.desc: Dokter Williams wordt opgeroepen om een mysterieuze gevangene te onderzoeken. De gedetineerde, Voorman genaamd, beweert een god te zijn. De sceptische dokter moet uitzoeken of Voorman geschift is, of zich alleen zo voordoet.

programme.title: The Youth in Us
programme.desc: A young couple confronts a painful future by looking to the past.

programme.title: Deathless
programme.desc: British P.I. John Ray is on the trail of alleged murderer Max Serloom, who has kidnapped John's wife. Only one mancan win the deadly duel of wits and bullets that follows, played out in a deserted London warehouse.

programme.title: Henrietta bulkowski
programme.desc: A determined young woman, crippled with a severe hunchback, will stop at nothing to fulfill her dream of seeing the world. This is the story of how she finds happiness.

programme.title: Biagio
programme.desc: Biagio, a kids show funny red puppet, stars in a gritty film about crime and addiction.

programme.title: Watch in color
programme.desc: In our commitment to providing a platform for all filmmakers, we're showcasing a collection of films made by and starring filmmakers of color; in projects that prove just how imaginative and inclusive shorts can be.

programme.title: Keep mum
programme.desc: A woman drunkenly wrecks her big family house. Soon it turns out that her past haunts her, throwing her into a whirlwind of emotions and projections as she tries to piece together what happened to her.

programme.title: The springfield three
programme.desc: Based on the 1992 disappearance, three women driving out of town to start a new life and escape their old one, horrifically encounter their inevitable fates.

programme.title: The daughters of virtue
programme.desc: What begins as a routine prayer group meeting soon morphs into a fanatical intervention when the group confronts Alice, one of their members, over a dark secret she is hiding.

programme.title: Cursed world problems
programme.desc: While visiting their parents, an expecting couple discover that there is an evil curse on their family's bloodline and their unborn child is in grave danger

programme.title: Filmmaker spotlight - james bort
programme.desc: Filmmaker Spotlight gives you an insight into the filmmaking process by screening a film followed by an exclusive interview with the creator. This time we spoke with director James Bort about his short film -Rise of a Star'.

programme.title: The Voorman Problem
programme.desc: Dokter Williams wordt opgeroepen om een mysterieuze gevangene te onderzoeken. De gedetineerde, Voorman genaamd, beweert een god te zijn. De sceptische dokter moet uitzoeken of Voorman geschift is, of zich alleen zo voordoet.

programme.title: The Youth in Us
programme.desc: A young couple confronts a painful future by looking to the past.

programme.title: Deathless
programme.desc: British P.I. John Ray is on the trail of alleged murderer Max Serloom, who has kidnapped John's wife. Only one mancan win the deadly duel of wits and bullets that follows, played out in a deserted London warehouse.

programme.title: Henrietta bulkowski
programme.desc: A determined young woman, crippled with a severe hunchback, will stop at nothing to fulfill her dream of seeing the world. This is the story of how she finds happiness.

programme.title: Animation
programme.desc: Série d'animation

programme.title: Animation
programme.desc: Série d'animation

programme.title: Joy ride
programme.desc: Two men. Frozen tundra as far as the eye can see. No way out. Or is there?

programme.title: Welcome to iron knob
programme.desc: After a young boy accidentally shoots a stranger with his father's gun, it is left to the nonchalant townsfolk to cover it up as quickly as possible - so they can get back to doing whatever it was that they were doing before...

programme.title: Kiddo
programme.desc: A tale of an innocent child with a malevolent mind.

programme.title: Intermedium
programme.desc: An obsessive-compulsive teenager struggles to learn the value of compromise while adjusting to her new home (and butting heads with the ghost of the boy who haunts it).

programme.title: Kicks
programme.desc: Wanneer de jonge rapper Redouan door een politiekogel om het leven komt, dreigen zijn broer Saïd en getuige Aaliyah een speelbal te worden in de emoties van Marokkaanse en autochtone Nederlanders.

programme.title: Lady Luck
programme.desc: Een vrouw trouwt met een gokker in de hoop haar kersverse man terug op het rechte pad te brengen, maar de zaken lopen niet zoals ze vooraf had gepland.

programme.title: The kicksled choir
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Gabriel dreams of joining the Kicksled Choir, a local caroling group known for raising donations for the refugees. But he faces an unexpected hurdle after he witnesses his father's alarming aggression towards the very people he wants to help.

programme.title: Honey do
programme.desc: A man sets out to complete one last honey do list.

programme.title: Belgian stories-out of blue into black
Filmmaker spotlight - clemence poesy
programme.desc: Filmmaker Spotlight gives you an insight into the filmmaking process by screening a film followed by an exclusive interview with the creator. This time we spoke with director Clemence Poesy about her short, 'King of the Wind Demons'.

programme.title: Viewers' Choice
programme.desc: Welcome to Viewers' Choice. In this show we'll be reviewing the best films you've been watching on our Video on Demand services. Presented by Johanna Botta.

programme.title: Filmmaker spotlight - james bort
programme.desc: Filmmaker Spotlight gives you an insight into the filmmaking process by screening a film followed by an exclusive interview with the creator. This time we spoke with director James Bort about his short film -Rise of a Star'.

programme.title: Biagio
programme.desc: Biagio, a kids show funny red puppet, stars in a gritty film about crime and addiction.

programme.title: Keep mum
programme.desc: A woman drunkenly wrecks her big family house. Soon it turns out that her past haunts her, throwing her into a whirlwind of emotions and projections as she tries to piece together what happened to her.

programme.title: The springfield three
programme.desc: Based on the 1992 disappearance, three women driving out of town to start a new life and escape their old one, horrifically encounter their inevitable fates.

programme.title: The daughters of virtue
programme.desc: What begins as a routine prayer group meeting soon morphs into a fanatical intervention when the group confronts Alice, one of their members, over a dark secret she is hiding.

programme.title: Cursed world problems
programme.desc: While visiting their parents, an expecting couple discover that there is an evil curse on their family's bloodline and their unborn child is in grave danger

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Een groep vrienden die elkaar regelmatig ontmoet voor game-avonden, raakt verstrikt in een echt mysterie wanneer de louche broer van één van hen schijnbaar om te lachen wordt ontvoerd door gevaarlijke gangsters.

programme.title: Samoeraai
programme.desc: The young Ivan lives with his eccentric single mother in Rotterdam. When he receives a samurai sword one day, all his hopes and dreams become reality.

programme.title: The man who killed james bond
programme.desc: Fabrizio is a petty thief from St. Basil, a seedy suburb in Rome. He is finally facing the man who ruined his life, James Bond. The fascinating British spy was an idol for Fabrizio, who didn't miss any of his countless action movies.

programme.title: Viewers' Choice
programme.desc: Welcome to Viewers' Choice. In this show we'll be reviewing the best films you've been watching on our Video on Demand services. Presented by Johanna Botta.

programme.title: Biagio
programme.desc: Biagio, a kids show funny red puppet, stars in a gritty film about crime and addiction.

programme.title: Keep mum
programme.desc: A woman drunkenly wrecks her big family house. Soon it turns out that her past haunts her, throwing her into a whirlwind of emotions and projections as she tries to piece together what happened to her.

programme.title: The springfield three
programme.desc: Based on the 1992 disappearance, three women driving out of town to start a new life and escape their old one, horrifically encounter their inevitable fates.

programme.title: The daughters of virtue
programme.desc: What begins as a routine prayer group meeting soon morphs into a fanatical intervention when the group confronts Alice, one of their members, over a dark secret she is hiding.

programme.title: Cursed world problems
programme.desc: While visiting their parents, an expecting couple discover that there is an evil curse on their family's bloodline and their unborn child is in grave danger

Watch in color
programme.desc: In our commitment to providing a platform for all filmmakers, we're showcasing a collection of films made by and starring filmmakers of color; in projects that prove just how imaginative and inclusive shorts can be.

programme.title: Pitch to premiere - sieda
programme.desc: Pitch to Premiere follows previous winners of the 'The Pitch' competition as they complete their project. This time we're going to focus on the winning film, 'Sieda' by The Pitch: Cannes 2018 winner Vanessa Pellegrin.

programme.title: Geen programmagegevens beschikbaar
programme.desc: Geen programmagegevens beschikbaar.
